name: Rorschach / Subjective Prompt With A Fixed Rubric
description: Interrogate five visually ambiguous ink materials with a seeded three-tool protocol, observe every transient response, and physically stamp the specimen matching an objective rubric.
natural_language: Follow the posted FOLD, PRESSURE, and COOL protocol in its exact order. Observe each full transient response across all five materials, then drag the verification stamp to the one specimen matching the objective rubric and certify it.

metadata.variant_count_kind: protocol order, objective response signature, culprit specimen, labels, and blot-shape combinations
metadata.notes: Five initially equivalent inkblots must be interrogated with three different physical tools in a generated order; the verifier independently replays gesture duration, all 21 transient response samples, and the final stamp drag without trusting a client-side answer flag.
